response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership in diverse engineering roles, but lacks explicit experience in IT architecture design, UML, and client-facing consulting — critical for this role. His German proficiency is only basic, falling short of the required C1, and his resume lacks clear evidence of team leadership or project management at an executive level.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact in GIS and tooling
Proven full-stack expertise across languages, platforms, and high-scale systems
Demonstrated mentorship through workshops, courses, and community engagement
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not meeting C1 requirement
No clear evidence of UML, IT architecture design, or client advisory experience
Leadership roles are technical, not executive — lacks team/program management scope
